message:
🌱 Add opentelemetry-collector: [service/telemetry/metrics] GRPC OTLP periodic reader mission (#1510)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-collector-12701-service-telemetry-metrics-grpc-otlp-periodic-reade",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry-collector: [service/telemetry/metrics] GRPC OTLP periodic reader ignores insecure configuration",
+    "description": "[service/telemetry/metrics] GRPC OTLP periodic reader ignores insecure configuration. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify opentelemetry-collector troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your opentelemetry-collector deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector -n opentelemetry-collector --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `code = DeadlineExceeded desc = context deadline exceeded`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-collector configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-collector configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-collector
```
### Component(s)

_No response_

### What happened?

OpenTelemetry Collector ignores both `insecure: true` and `http` schema in endpoint in internal telemetry periodic reader GRPC configuration."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [service/telemetry/metrics] GRPC OTLP periodic reader…",
+        "description": "Issue is valid for both vanilla and contrib distributions.
Here is the log from `otelcol` distribution:
```
$ ./otelcol --config otel-grpc-test.yaml
2025-03-24T11:56:56.731+0200    info    service.122.1/service.go:193 Setting up own telemetry...
2025-03-24T11:56:56.731+0200    info   
```yaml
receivers:
  otlp:
    protocols:
      grpc:
        endpoint: localhost:4317

exporters:
  debug: {}

service:
  pipelines:
    metrics:
      receivers:
        - otlp
      exporters:
        - debug
  telemetry:
    logs:
        level: INFO
    metrics:
      level: normal
      readers:
        - periodic:
            interval: 10000
            # Timeout for reader itself, in milliseconds
            timeout: 3000
            exporter:
              otlp:
                protocol: grpc
                endpoint: http://localhost:4317
                compression: gzip
                ins
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [service/telemetry/metrics] GRPC OTLP periodic… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector -n opentelemetry-collector --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry-collector --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `code = DeadlineExceeded desc = context deadline exceeded` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Issue is valid for both vanilla and contrib distributions.
Here is the log from `otelcol` distribution:
```
$ ./otelcol --config otel-grpc-test.yaml
2025-03-24T11:56:56.731+0200    info    service.122.1/service.go:193 Setting up own telemetry...
2025-03-24T11:56:56.731+0200    info    builders/builders.go:26 Development component. May change in the future.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "receivers:
  otlp:
    protocols:
      grpc:
        endpoint: localhost:4317

exporters:
  debug: {}

service:
  pipelines:
    metrics:
      receivers:
        - otlp
      exporters:
        - debug
  telemetry:
    logs:
        level: INFO
    metrics:
      level: normal
      readers:
        - periodic:
            interval: 10000
            # Timeout for reader itself, in milliseconds
            timeout: 3000
            exporter:
              otlp:
                protocol: grpc
                endpoint: http://localhost:4317
                compression: gzip
                insecure: true
                # Timeout for sending telemetry, in milliseconds
                timeout: 5000"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry-collector",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentelemetry-collector"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/issues/12701",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector"
+    },
+    "reactions": 11,
+    "comments": 8,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-collector installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-19T06:35:19.957Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
